memberdef.name: EXPAND_GRID_DEFINITIONS
memberdef.initializer: typedef Grid<float, SIZE, false> Grid##SIZE##f; \ typedef Grid<double, SIZE, false> Grid##SIZE##d; \ typedef Grid<float, SIZE, true> Grid##SIZE##fCUDA; \ typedef Grid<double, SIZE, true> Grid##SIZE##dCUDA;

detaileddescription.para: Wrapper classes for holding dense, multi-dimensional arrays of data. Ported from CUDA to Apple Silicon MPS (unified memory).
